subcodes.title: Words to Wilson, Engelhorn, Stewart, Brittingham, spoken around 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: In these days, in the newspapers, very much is said about the North Pole - that Mr Peary has discovered it... We must endeavor to discover the world of humanity and the mysteries hidden in the reality of man.
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @knowledge; recognition of God, @effort; striving, @knowledge of self
